query: How do I track my order?
response: You can track your order by visiting our website and entering your order ID in the 'Track Order' section. You will also receive email updates.
Your package can be tracked using the tracking number sent to your email. Please check your spam folder if you cannot find it.

query: I haven't received my order yet
response: We apologize for the delay. Please share your order ID and we will investigate the status of your shipment immediately.

response: Please provide your order number so we can check the current delivery status for you.

query: How can I return a product?
response: You can return any product within 30 days of purchase. Visit our returns portal and follow the instructions to generate a return label.

query: I want to return my item
response: No problem! You can initiate a return from your account under 'My Orders'. Select the item and choose 'Return'. We offer free returns within 30 days.

query: How do I get a refund?
response: Once we receive your returned item, the refund will be processed within 5-7 business days to your original payment method.

response: We sincerely apologize! Please take a photo of the damaged item and contact us with your order ID. We'll send a replacement immediately.

query: How do I cancel my order?
response: Orders can be cancelled within 24 hours of placement. Go to 'My Orders', select the order, and click 'Cancel Order'.

query: I want to cancel my order

query: Can you cancel the order I just placed?
response: Sure! If it was placed within the last 24 hours and hasn't shipped, we can cancel it. What's your order ID?

query: How do I reset my password?
response: Click on 'Forgot Password' on the login page and enter your registered email address. You'll receive a reset link within a few minutes.

response: Please try resetting your password first. If the issue persists, clear your browser cache or try a different browser.

query: How do I change my email address?
response: You can update your email in 'Account Settings'. Go to Profile > Edit > Update Email. A verification link will be sent to your new email.
